summary.headline: Automation decision rules and write boundaries are concrete and enforceable.
summary.details: The automation matrix classifies instruction, workflow, prompt, agent, and future skill responsibilities. The evidence triage artifact can update seeded eval outputs but is blocked from addon paths outside the first-release boundary, and the run-record helper emits schema-valid logs.

checks.details: The repository now has an explicit decision matrix for instructions, scripts, prompts, agents, and local skills.
The evidence triage artifact is permitted to update `tools/evals/001-agent-tooling-foundation/us3-validation-results.json`.
The same artifact is rejected when asked to update `addons/agent_runtime_harness/plugin.gd` because addon paths are outside the declared boundary.
`tools/automation/run-records/godot-evidence-triage-validation.json` was generated and validated against the autonomous run record schema.
